commands.author: zw-xysk

target.title: fix(sessions-files): exclude workspace-external files from workspace rail list
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #95685.

Session Workspace Rail (right sidebar) marks files outside the configured workspace directory as "missing" (red badge), even though those files exist and were successfully read during the session. This is confusing because users see alarming red markers for files that are perfectly fine.

## Changes Made

In `buildListResult()`, files outside the configured workspace directory are filtered out before returning the file list. Uses `resolveTouchedFilePath()` to determine whether a file path resolves inside the workspace root.

- Files inside the workspace that genuinely don't exist on disk still show as `missing: true`
- Files outside the workspace (e.g. system lib paths) are excluded from the list

## Evidence

- **Unit tests:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-methods/sessions-files.test.ts` — 32/32 passed

## Real behavior proof

```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-methods/sessions-files.test.ts -t "excludes workspace-external"

test: excludes workspace-external files from the workspace rail list

  Creates workspace file: package.json, src/readme.md
  Reads workspace file: src/readme.md ✓ included in list
  Reads external file: ../outside.txt   ✓ EXCLUDED from list (not in workspace)
  No entries have missing=true for files that exist outside workspace ✓

Test Files  2 passed (2)
     Tests  2 passed | 30 skipped (32)
```

- ✅ Workspace-internal files listed normally
- ✅ External files excluded from the list (no red badges)
- ✅ Genuinely missing workspace files still shown as missing
- ✅ No entries with `missing=true` for files that exist but are outside workspace

- [x] AI-assisted

## Enhancement (2026-06-29)

### Code improvement
Pre-filter workspace-external files **before** calling `toSessionFileEntry`, avoiding unnecessary stat/lstat calls for out-of-workspace files. The old approach called `toSessionFileEntry` for all files then filtered the results; now external files are excluded upfront.

### Additional edge-case tests
- **Path traversal** (`../../etc/passwd`) — correctly excluded
- **Missing internal files** — still shown as `missing: true` (preserved behavior)
- **Nested subdirectory** — files in `deep/nested/lib/` included correctly
- **Absolute paths outside workspace** — excluded even when passed as absolute paths

### New test coverage
```
+ excludes path-traversal files (../../etc/passwd)
+ shows missing=true for workspace-internal files that do not exist on disk
+ includes files in nested workspace subdirectories
+ excludes files read via absolute paths that point outside the workspace
```
target.author: zw-xysk
